human_verification.notes: Reviewed franchise-specific onboarding boundaries, disclosure and addenda evidence handling, access and training gating, go-live controls, and scenario-to-ability coverage.

review_notes: All required cross-industry source classes and required scenario families are represented in the research summary.
All shared, workflow-phase, and cross-industry abilities are present in the functionality map and covered by passing scenarios.
No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains for a validated spec pack because tenant and jurisdiction differences are explicit retrieval and escalation dependencies.

specialist_owned_evidence: Franchise-specific onboarding evidence includes FDD receipt, agreement and addenda, training completion, access approvals, and opening-checklist readiness rather than generic intake paperwork.
Boundary handling explicitly stops at readiness validation and handoff packaging; legal interpretation, financing approval, and permitting signoff remain outside the lane.
Go-live claims require evidence-backed prerequisite closure, deferred-scope capture, and explicit next-owner routing.
notes: Runtime remains `specification-based` and does not claim a retained-implementation implementation unless explicitly promoted in a separate change.
